meta.title: Hilal Browser
meta.description: Privacy-first, open-source browser built directly on Firefox source code. Developed by VastSea, Turkey.

hero.title: Hilal Browser
hero.tagline: A privacy-first, open-source browser built on Firefox. Crafted in Turkey, for everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy-first
privacy.description: Telemetry disabled by default. Strict tracking protection. No unsolicited network calls. Your data stays yours.

opensource.title: Open source & free
opensource.description: Released under the Mozilla Public License 2.0. Full source available. No paywalls, no proprietary lock-in.

community.title: Community-driven
community.description: Built by a small team with community input. Every issue, test, and translation matters.

turkey.title: Built in Turkey, for everyone
turkey.description: Developed by VastSea in Turkey with a global perspective. Local care, worldwide reach.

firefox.title: Built on Firefox
firefox.description: Not Chromium. A genuine Firefox-based engine with thoughtful defaults and modern UX.

history.title: Development History
history.subtitle: Same vision. Different forms. Each chapter taught us something new.

alpha.title: Early Alpha
alpha.body: Hilal Browser is experimental software. Features may change, crash, or disappear without warning. We are building this in the open and invite brave testers and early contributors to shape what comes next. There is no stable release yet — when there is, you will hear it here first.

contribute.title: Contribute
contribute.body: Hilal is a community project. Whether you write code, file bugs, test builds, or translate strings, there is a place for you.

ways.testing: Test early builds and give feedback

footer.license: Hilal branding assets are © Hilal Browser contributors. Build glue, scripts, and patches are released under the Mozilla Public License 2.0.
